data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Adds a layer of security through multi-factor authentication.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Encrypts data at all stages from user to server.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts routine security assessments to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Penetration testing, bug bounties, security certifications.

data.title: Threat Detection Systems
data.description: Implements real-time detection of malicious activities.
data.technical_spec: AI-based threat monitoring, intrusion detection systems.

data.title: Access Control Management
data.description: Restricts access based on user roles and needs.
data.technical_spec: Role-based access control, LDAP integration, secure access policies.
